name: FUNCTIONALLY_COMPLEMENTARY_TARGETPAIRS
description: List target pairs whose targets have different functional categories and show their patent counts.
cypher:
MATCH (tp:TargetPair)-[:HAS_TARGET]->(t1:Target)-[:FUNCTIONED_AS]->(f1:Functional_of_Target)
MATCH (tp)-[:HAS_TARGET]->(t2:Target)-[:FUNCTIONED_AS]->(f2:Functional_of_Target)
WHERE t1 <> t2 AND f1.name <> f2.name
MATCH (tp)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)
RETURN tp.name AS target_pair, collect(DISTINCT f1.name + ' vs ' + f2.name)[0] AS function_combo, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, target_pair
LIMIT 50;

result_schema.patent_count: Number of patents linked to the target pair

examples: Which target pairs combine different functional categories?
